title: jacobaea alpina subsp. alpina
intro: Jacobaea alpina subsp. alpina, also known as the Alpine Ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and gallbladder issues, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of fever. The health benefits of Jacobaea alpina subsp. alpina include its potential to improve liver function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and teas, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
